title: pyrrocoma cheiranthifolia
intro: Pyrrocoma cheiranthifolia, also known as the Mountain Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pyrrocoma cheiranthifolia include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin issues. Herbal preparations of Mountain Fleabane can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and minor wounds.
